user.title: Connect your Pluxee account
user.description:
**Recommended — connect with just your session cookie** (no callback URL needed):

1. In your normal web browser, log in at consumers.pluxee.at (email + captcha + one-time code). If you are already logged in, skip to step 2.
2. Press **F12 → Application → Cookies → `connect.pluxee.app`** and copy the `op_session*` rows (`op_session`, `op_session.sig`, `op_session.legacy`, `op_session.legacy.sig`).
3. Paste them into the **Session cookie** field below and submit. Leave the callback URL empty.

*Alternative (callback URL):* open the login link {auth_url}, log in, and copy the full address-bar URL that starts with `.../oidc/callback?code=...`. Note: Pluxee's page now redirects instantly and burns the code, so the cookie method above is more reliable.

data.callback_url: Callback URL (optional — leave empty if you pasted the cookie)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Pluxee
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Pluxee session expired. **Recommended:** log in again at consumers.pluxee.at in your browser, then press **F12 → Application → Cookies → `connect.pluxee.app`**, copy the `op_session*` rows and paste them into the **Session cookie** field below (leave the callback URL empty).

*Alternative:* open this link {auth_url}, log in, and paste the resulting `.../oidc/callback?code=...` URL.

data.callback_url: Callback URL (optional — leave empty if you pasted the cookie)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Pluxee
reconfigure.description:
**Recommended:** log in at consumers.pluxee.at in your browser, then press **F12 → Application → Cookies → `connect.pluxee.app`**, copy the `op_session*` rows and paste them into the **Session cookie** field below (leave the callback URL empty).

*Alternative:* open this link {auth_url}, log in, and paste the resulting `.../oidc/callback?code=...` URL.

data.callback_url: Callback URL (optional — leave empty if you pasted the cookie)

error.no_code: Nothing to authenticate with. Paste your session cookie (the `op_session*` rows for `connect.pluxee.app`) — or, if using the callback method, the whole URL that contains `code=`.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed or the code expired. Open the link again, log in and paste the new URL quickly.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Pluxee. Please try again.
error.session_cookie_invalid: The session cookie is not valid (no `op_session`, wrong format, or expired). Copy the full `Cookie:` request header for `connect.pluxee.app` (it must include `op_session=...`), or leave the field empty to continue without it.

abort.already_configured: This Pluxee account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The account you logged into does not match the one being reconfigured.

data.transaction_count: Number of recent transactions to keep (0 to disable)
